description: A web-based healthcare platform that helps patients, providers, and emergency services manage healthcare efficiently.

responses: Click on Sign Up and fill in your details like name, email, and password.
You can register by providing your basic details in the registration form.
Enter your email and password to log in.
If you forgot your password, click on 'Forgot Password'.

patterns: I need to see a doctor
responses: Go to the Booking page, select a doctor, choose date and time, and confirm.
You can book an appointment by selecting your preferred doctor and time slot.
You can view all your appointments in the dashboard.
Go to 'My Appointments' to see your booking history.
Go to your appointments and click cancel or reschedule.
You can modify your booking from the dashboard.
Click the Emergency button to send an alert immediately.
Your emergency request will be sent along with your location.
We will show nearby hospitals based on your location.
Check the emergency section to find nearby healthcare centers.
Maintain a balanced diet, exercise regularly, and stay hydrated.
Regular checkups and a healthy lifestyle are key to good health.
Practice mindfulness, take breaks, and seek professional help if needed.
Talking to someone and maintaining a routine can improve mental health.
Go to your profile section and click edit to update your details.
You can modify your personal information in the profile settings.
Your medical history is available in your dashboard.
Check the records section to view your health data.
